notes: Hand-curated observed shapes for primitives whose returns we can verify by reading body/ source (pure-Python returns) or by inspecting the bridge projection path (src/repl/bridge.ts:projectVaultResult). Scope is deliberately narrow — only entries we are HIGH CONFIDENCE about. Expand as primitives are audited live. Regenerate whenever primitives change shape; the smoke probe fails CI when schema.py drifts from this fixture. See body/schema_calibrate.py for the comparator contract.
